Me

I’m developer with 5 years of professional experience with web based apps and systems. Currently specializing in Ruby on Rails and ReactJS development. I am also intrested in database programming, creating mobile apps and PWAs.

Also I’m bike home mechanic - so reach me if you need any help with your bike.
